channel.title: Budget Friendly
channel.attribution_scope: Only the individually documented 2026 examples are attributed to ShortsEngine workflows; the rest of the channel is not attributed.

examples.title: Why Cynicism Never Helps You | Andrew Huberman #Shorts

evidence: YouTube returned a canonical Shorts URL and video metadata.
The public page reported a 19-second duration and 405x720 dimensions.

examples.technical_summary: Public motivational Short verified from YouTube page metadata. The workflow attribution is operator supplied; a matching ShortsEngine job record, render manifest and quality report were not recorded in the inspected repository evidence.

examples.title: unknown

evidence: YouTube displayed Video unavailable for the supplied Shorts URL on 2026-07-23.
No public title or media metadata could be verified.

examples.technical_summary: The supplied football workflow attribution is retained, but the URL was unavailable during verification. No output-specific job, event-evidence, framing, caption, render or final-QA record is claimed.

examples.title: The GPS clocks that looked haunted

source_rights_status.disclosure: Institutional factual sources; original engine-generated SVG visuals; self-recorded narration with recorded commercial-use permission.

automatic_pipeline_stages: animation, media, content, timeline and rights QA
known_human_interventions: operator approval of the revision-1 content bundle
operator publish approval for guarded local release
quality_gates_executed: browser state-isolation and repeated-frame determinism checks passed
semantic geometry, label coverage and caption-safe-zone checks passed
50 of 50 blocking technical QA gates passed
H.264/AAC container, duration, dimensions, frame rate and pixel format verified
narration rights, visual-asset rights and source bindings verified

evidence: MP4 ftyp signature and ISO Base Media container verified.
FFprobe and the render manifest agree on 41.1 seconds, 1080x1920 and 30 fps.
The completed render job, AnimationIR, render manifest, narration manifest, provenance report, rights manifest and QA reports bind to the same output hash.
Artifact metadata marks the output technicalFinal true, publishable false and publishApprovalRequired true.

examples.technical_summary: Repository-backed narrated animation with approved content, aligned self-recorded narration, five semantic story beats, frame-addressable AnimationIR, continuous local vector rendering, burned captions, deterministic browser proof and a complete 50-gate technical QA package. The public URL and producing Git commit were not recorded.
